scripts.start: node -e "const http = require('http'), fs = require('fs'), path = require('path'); http.createServer((req, res) => { let p = path.join(__dirname, req.url === '/' ? 'index.html' : req.url); if (fs.existsSync(p)) { res.writeHead(200); fs.createReadStream(p).pipe(res); } else { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); } }).listen(3000);"
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp -r src public index.html dist/ && cp public/* dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
